Notes: Single UPDATE adds a CNAME and an A RR at the same owner name alias.campus.edu. to probe server behavior when mutually exclusive data are introduced together.

Steps.Description: Add alias.campus.edu. as both a CNAME and an A owner in the same UPDATE message.

Steps.Name: alias.campus.edu.
Steps.Description: Observe whether the server kept the CNAME, the A RRset, both, or neither after the UPDATE.
